creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 164597
Patch

- Mark broken on 9.x:

Building /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/bootstrap/gems/rubysl-digest-2.0.3...
creating Makefile
utilities::thread: Mutex::lock: invalid
pure virtual method called
[BUG] Uncaught C++ internal exception
So sorry, it appears that you've encountered an internal
bug. Please report this on the rubinius issue tracker.
Include the following backtrace in the issue:

Abort!
0x5dd205 <_ZN8rubinius17cpp_exception_bugEv+101> at /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/stage/usr/local/bin/rbx
0x8028a7938 <_ZSt17rethrow_exceptionNSt15__exception_ptr13exception_ptrE+120> at /usr/local/lib/gcc48/libstdc++.so.6
0x6b3bde <_ZN8rubinius13SignalHandler16print_backtracesEv+4286> at /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/stage/usr/local/bin/rbx
0x801f8c236 <pthread_sigmask+918> at /lib/libthr.so.3
rake aborted!
Command failed with status (): [/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/stag...]
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/rakelib/gems.rake:5:in `bootstrap_rubinius'
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/rakelib/gems.rake:89:in `block (4 levels) in <top (required)>'
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/rakelib/gems.rake:86:in `chdir'
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/rakelib/gems.rake:86:in `block (3 levels) in <top (required)>'
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/rakelib/gems.rake:79:in `block (2 levels) in <top (required)>'
Tasks: TOP => build => build:build => gems:extensions
(See full trace by running task with --trace)
*** [do-build] Error code 1

- Mark broken on 11.x:

/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rubinius/work/rubinius-2.5.2/vm/oop.hpp:613:14: error: 'this' pointer cannot be null in well-defined C++ code; pointer may be assumed to always convert to true [-Werror,-Wundefined-bool-conversion]

- Remove unneeded @dir's from plist
- Add USES=libedit
- Fix hardcoded %%FREEBSD_DIR%% and %%RUBY_VER%% in plist
- Remove .o files which are not really installed from plist

The last 3 items unbreak the port on 10-i386 and 10-amd64. Excerpts from relevant failure logs:

Error: Bad linking on [libedit.so.7] please add USES=libedit

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
